existingSystem.notes: Brownfield Flutter mobile app. Clean Architecture (domain/data/presentation). BLoC/Cubit state management. Firebase Auth + Firestore + Storage. rideglory-api is a separate NestJS microservices repo.

assumptions: GET /users/me returns fullName, email, and userId at minimum. profilePhotoUrl is absent from the current Prisma User model and is not expected in Iteration 1.
Unsplash free developer tier (50 req/hour) is sufficient for pilot usage. Backend returns 503 on rate limit.
go_router v17 extra-based navigation can be extended with by-id route variants without a full router rewrite.
TrackingWsClient auto-reconnect logic is unaffected by SOS message type additions.
Apple Developer account has push notifications enabled for the app bundle ID. APNs p8 key is available before Iteration 6a.
ClaudeService in rideglory-api (created in Iteration 3a) uses Anthropic Node.js SDK and is reused in Iteration 4 without modification.
Stitch reference images at /Users/cami/Downloads/stitch_rideglory/ are copied to docs/design/stitch-references/ before Track P begins.
Claude Haiku per-request cost for SOAT extraction is acceptable without rate limiting given the pilot rider base.
risks: Event filter backend gap (Iteration 2 blocker): GET /events does not pass filter params to events-ms today. Backend changes are in scope for Iteration 2.
go_router extra non-serializability from FCM payloads (Iteration 6a): NotificationNavigator + by-id route pattern required for terminated-app deep links.
Claude Haiku PDF extraction reliability (Iteration 3a): Variable accuracy mitigated by confirmation step, low-confidence warning banner, and manual entry fallback.
FCM on iOS APNs configuration (Iteration 6a): APNs key + Xcode capability must be confirmed before Iteration 6a begins.
Firebase Storage PDF access from backend (Iteration 3a): Backend uses Admin SDK path-based access; Storage IAM permissions must allow the service account to read.
EventFormCubit state refactor cross-iteration regression (Iteration 4): Existing EventFormCubit tests must be updated after freezed class conversion.
Pencil single-machine dependency (Track P): Stitch reference images must be copied to docs/design/stitch-references/ before Track P.
deferred: SOAT push reminders (30-day / 7-day) — requires FCM from Iteration 6a; scheduled post-6b.
Profile photo upload — profilePhotoUrl not in current Prisma schema; deferred post-6b.
Organizer SOS dismiss — only the SOS sender can cancel in v1; organizer dismiss deferred to v2.
AI event recommendations Claude narrative explanations (v2) — deterministic scoring sufficient for launch.
Authentication Clean Architecture refactor — auth works via AuthService; no user-visible value.
Mandatory documents beyond SOAT (tecno, other) — DTO and schema extensible but only SOAT in v1.
Web version, admin dashboard, payments, social feed — explicitly out of scope per PRD section 10.
CI/CD IPA build + App Store submission — APK build only in DevOps track; IPA deferred until distribution target confirmed.

iterations.goal: Framework: PRD, agents, handoffs, workflow, dashboard, CLI commands
iterations.notes: Run /solo-plan to define product iterations. Framework installed from Claude-cami reference.

iterations.title: Test Infrastructure + Profile Feature Completion
iterations.goal: Establish a working test suite for critical existing features and complete the profile page stub so the rider experience is coherent end-to-end.

iterations.title: Event Discovery Filters + Attendee Profile Links
iterations.goal: Wire the existing filter bottom sheet to real backend query parameters and enable riders to navigate to other riders' profiles from the attendee list.

iterations.title: SOAT Backend Infrastructure + Flutter Domain/Data Stub (3a)
iterations.goal: Build the complete backend infrastructure for SOAT document management (Prisma schema, REST endpoints, Claude Haiku AI extraction) and implement Flutter domain and data layers.

iterations.title: SOAT Full Flutter UI + Garage Status Badges (3b)
iterations.goal: Implement the complete multi-step SOAT upload UI and the visual expiration status badge on vehicle cards throughout the garage.

iterations.title: AI Event Cover Image Generation
iterations.goal: Wire the existing 'Generar portada con IA' button to a backend endpoint using Claude Haiku + Unsplash API to generate relevant event cover images.

iterations.title: AI Event Recommendations
iterations.goal: Populate the existing recommendations section on the home dashboard with personalized event suggestions from a new backend scoring endpoint.

iterations.title: Push Notifications (FCM) (6a)
iterations.goal: Integrate Firebase Cloud Messaging to deliver push notifications for all 5 registration and event-status triggers with correct deep-link routing for all 3 app states.

iterations.title: SOS Real-Time Alert (6b)
iterations.goal: Add SOS emergency broadcast to the live tracking session with a persistent top-anchor red banner overlay visible to all riders in the same event session.

iterations.title: Design System in Pencil (Track P)
iterations.goal: Establish Pencil as the source of truth for all Rideglory UI by migrating all existing screen flows into pencil-new.pen with design tokens defined as variables.
iterations.notes: Runs alongside Iterations 1 through 3a. Must complete SOAT upload flow screens before Iteration 3b frontend begins. Hard gate: 3b depends on P.

iterations.title: CI/CD Pipeline (Track DevOps)
iterations.goal: Deliver a GitHub Actions pipeline running dart analyze + flutter test on every push to iter-N branches and every PR to main, with an optional APK build job on version tags.
iterations.notes: Runs in parallel with Iteration 2. CI gate is automated from Iteration 3 onward. Delivers .github/workflows/flutter-ci.yml.

tasks.title: Framework ready — run /solo-plan to plan iterations from the PRD
Set up test infrastructure: add mocktail, bloc_test, network_image_mock to dev_dependencies and create test directory tree
Write blocTest groups for VehicleCubit, EventsCubit, EventDetailCubit, and MaintenancesCubit (5 state transitions each)
Write widget tests for vehicle garage page, event list page, and event detail page (all ResultState branches); create integration test stub files
Implement ProfileCubit, GetMyProfileUseCase, and Profile page UI (name, email, initials avatar, main vehicle, all ResultState branches)
Code review and cleanup: dart analyze, remove print calls, fix lint violations, remove dead code, produce docs/architecture/code-review-iter1.md
QA gate: run dart analyze + flutter test, verify all ResultState widget branches are covered, validate no hardcoded strings
Architect: define ProfileCubit DI scope (ADR-1) and confirm no-backend-change for iter-1
Frontend (architect-derived): add lib/core/utils/initials.dart helper alongside ProfileCubit

events.detail: Clean workflow state for Rideglory (Flutter brownfield). Existing system detected: lib/ (Flutter app) + rideglory-api (NestJS backend). No product plan until /solo-plan. Run /solo-plan to begin.
FRESH planning run started. RUN_MODE=FRESH (docs/PLAN.md did not exist). Brownfield=true. No design handoffs. No prior mockups. Spawning Scanner agent (haiku).

Final plan drafted by PO synthesis agent. 8 product iterations (1, 2, 3a, 3b, 4, 5, 6a, 6b) + 2 parallel tracks (P: Pencil design, DevOps: CI/CD). planStatus set to awaiting_approval. Run /solo-approve to proceed.

Plan approved. 8 product iterations locked (1, 2, 3a, 3b, 4, 5, 6a, 6b) + 2 parallel tracks (P, DevOps). Domain skills generated for all 8 agents: po, architect, design, backend, frontend, qa, tech_lead, devops. Iteration branches created: iter-1, iter-2, iter-3a, iter-3b, iter-4, iter-5, iter-6a, iter-6b.
Iter-1 scoped: 5 stories (US-1-1 test infra, US-1-2 cubit tests, US-1-3 widget tests, US-1-4 profile page, US-1-5 code review); 6 tasks created; QA gate task T-1-6 added.
Iter-1 scope defined: test infrastructure + ProfileCubit + code review; 5 user stories, 6 tasks (3 qa, 1 frontend, 1 tech_lead, 1 qa gate)

No backend changes. Defined ProfileCubit (lazySingleton, root MBP) + GetMyProfileUseCase + initials helper + 5 l10n keys. ADR-1 and ADR-2 documented. Slim handoffs written for backend/frontend/devops/qa. DIAGRAMS.md initialized with profile fetch sequence.
Architect phase complete — feature arch (Profile cubit/use case) + no API contract changes confirmed for iter-1
Profile page designed — 4 states (loading shimmer, data with vehicle, empty no vehicle, error + retry). styles.css baseline established.
Profile page — 4 ResultState mockups (loading, data, empty, error); styles.css design baseline created
Backend skipped — no rideglory-api changes required for iter-1. GET /users/me sufficient.
